title: Golden Crumbly Korean Casabe Pancakes
description: A kid-friendly Korean dish featuring casabe, with an earthy and crumbly texture, perfect for a snack or light meal. This egg-free friendly recipe is a great alternative for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the crushed casabe, flour, cornstarch, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add in the water and mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Add in the vegetable oil and continue to mix until the dough comes together.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a pancake shape.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the pancakes for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Brush the pancakes with a little bit of vegetable oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
Serve the pancakes warm and enjoy.
